revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
[[ja:近津神社 (大子町下野宮)]] == Chikatsu Shrine (近津神社) == {{cite|date=August 2020|qq=}} {{infobox Shinto shrine | Name = Chikatsu Shrine | image = [[File:Shimonomiya Chikatsu Jinja Keidai.jpg|280px]]
Shrine Grounds | Location = {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kuji District, Ibaraki|en|Kuji District, Ibaraki|qid=Q1075212|lt=Kuji District|1=Kuji District, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Daigo, Ibaraki|en|Daigo, Ibaraki|qid=Q1346817|lt=Daigo, Ibaraki|1=Daigo, Ibaraki}} Shimonomiya 1626 | Latitude = 36 | LatMin = 49 | LatSec = 4 | N/S = N | Longitude = 140 | LongMin = 22 | LongSec = 23 | E/W = E | CountryCode = JP-08 | LabelPosition = left | Deity = {{ill|Omodaru|ja|面足尊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omodaru|qq=}}
{{ill|Ayakashikone|ja|惶根尊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayakashikone|qq=}}
{{ill|Shinatsuhiko|ja|級長津彦命|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinatsuhiko|qq=}} | ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}} (minor) debated shrine
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}} | Founded = Traditionally {{ill|AD 707|en|AD 707|qid=Q23510|lt=707|1=AD 707}} ({{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|qid=Q428753|lt=Keiun era|1=Keiun}} 4) | MainHall = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|en|Shinmei-zukuri|qid=Q930545|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} | OtherNames = Shimonomiya Chikatsu Shrine | AnnualFestival = December 7 | Rituals = Nakataue (held on the {{ill|Summer solstice|en|Summer solstice|qid=Q7603898|lt=summer solstice|1=Summer solstice}}) | Map = Japan Ibaraki }} [[File:Shimonomiya Chikatsu Jinja Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii|qq=}}]] **Chikatsu Shrine** (近津神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Daigo, Ibaraki|en|Daigo, Ibaraki|qid=Q1346817|lt=Daigo, Ibaraki|1=Daigo, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Kuji District, Ibaraki|en|Kuji District, Ibaraki|qid=Q1075212|lt=Kuji District|1=Kuji District, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, Japan. It is considered a debated shrine under the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}} system and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}}. It is also commonly referred to as **Shimonomiya Chikatsu Shrine**. == History == According to shrine tradition, it was established by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=}}, with the shrine buildings constructed in the 4th year of the {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|qid=Q428753|lt=Keiun era|1=Keiun}} (707). During the {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei era|1=Kōhei}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|qid=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} donated 3,000 kanmon to the shrine. == Shrine Grounds == * **Hoko-sugi (鉾スギ)** – A designated {{ill|Natural Monument of Ibaraki Prefecture|ja|茨城県指定天然記念物|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natural Monument of Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}. This sacred tree is 43 meters tall with a trunk circumference of 9.6 meters and is estimated to be over 1,200 years old. It is believed to have been planted when the shrine was first established. File:Hokosugi Shimonomiya.jpg|Hoko-sugi File:Shimonomiya Chikatsu Jinja Zuishinmon.jpg|Zuishinmon Gate File:Shimonomiya Chikatsu Jinja Haiden.jpg|Haiden (Worship Hall) File:Shimonomiya Chikatsu Jinja Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) == Festivals and Rituals == ; **Nakataue of Chikatsu Shrine** : A rice planting festival held annually on the {{ill|Summer solstice|en|Summer solstice|qid=Q7603898|lt=summer solstice|1=Summer solstice}}. It is said to have originated with rice offerings donated by {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|en|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|qid=Q1194944|lt=Tokugawa Mitsukuni|1=Tokugawa Mitsukuni}} during the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, suggesting the ritual dates back to the mid-Edo period. Sacred ropes ({{ill|Shimenawa|en|Shimenawa|qid=Q1887421|lt=shimenawa|1=Shimenawa}}) are set around the rice fields, and after purification rites by the head priest, a group of young women (saotome) plant rice seedlings to the accompaniment of drums, flutes, and songs. ; **Omase Mawashi (御桝廻し)** : An ancient ritual once practiced at the "Three Chikatsu Shrines" ({{ill|Baba Tsutsukowake Shrine|ja|馬場都々古別神社|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baba Tsutsukowake Shrine|qq=}}, {{ill|Yatsugi Tsutsukowake Shrine|ja|八槻都々古別神社|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugi Tsutsukowake Shrine|qq=}}, and Shimonomiya Chikatsu Shrine) and later adopted by neighboring shrines. On October 28, a ritual rice measure (masu) filled with newly harvested rice is wrapped in straw matting and adorned with sacred wands (heisoku), then enshrined in a special hut. After seven years, it is passed to the next designated shrine with fresh rice. These rituals reflect the shrine’s role as a guardian deity of agriculture, with similar practices found throughout {{ill|Daigo, Ibaraki|en|Daigo, Ibaraki|qid=Q1346817|lt=Daigo, Ibaraki|1=Daigo, Ibaraki}} and {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}, indicating a wide agricultural belief system spanning northern {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|qid=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Province|1=Hitachi Province}} and southern {{ill|Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province|2=ja|3=陸奥国|ja|Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province|2=ja|3=陸奥国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutsu Province|qq=}}. == Access == * A 5-minute walk from {{ill|Shimonomiya Station|en|Shimonomiya Station|qid=Q7497007|lt=Shimonomiya Station|1=Shimonomiya Station}} on the {{ill|Suigun Line|en|Suigun Line|qid=Q1056202|lt=Suigun Line|1=Suigun Line}}, operated by {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=JR East|1=East Japan Railway Company}}. == External Links == * [http://www.daigo-bunkaisan.jp/page/page000042.html Nakataue of Chikatsu Shrine] - Official Cultural Heritage Site of Daigo Town {{Shinto|qq=}} {{List of Shinto shrines in Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}} ]] {{translated page|ja|近津神社 (大子町下野宮)|version=91524847|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:%E8%BF%91%E6%B4%A5%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%90%E7%94%BA%E4%B8%8B%E9%87%8E%E5%AE%AE)]] [[Chikata Shrine (Kanda)]] [[ja:近津神社]] == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] '''Chikata Shrine (Kanda) (Q54153265)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | RONSHA || {{ill|Chikata Shrine (Kanda)|lt=Chikatsu Shrine|ja|近津神社 (大子町下野宮)|qid=Q54153265|1=Chikata Shrine (Kanda)}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || — || — || {{ill|Inamurano Shrine|lt=Inamurano Shrine|qid=Q135039762|1=Inamurano Shrine}}; {{ill|Inamurano Shrine|lt=Inamurano Shrine|qid=Q135039762|1=Inamurano Shrine}} || {{coord|36.817729|140.373193|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181764 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q54153265}}==Notes== [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:大子町の建築物]] [[Category:大子町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ibaraki Prefecture]]
